name: Abandoned substation
description: Hum from dead transformers; perfect cover for jammers and caches.

name: Airport cargo hold
description: Rubber-stamped pallets and crews who stopped asking questions.

name: Auction backroom
description: Polite bidding upstairs; provenance burns downstairs.

name: Clinic front
description: Flu shots in front; precursor chemistry out the service door.

name: Courthouse records vault
description: Sealed filings and favors filed between the lines.

name: Downtown dead drop
description: High-traffic corner; fast in and out.

name: Embassy service tunnel
description: Laundry carts and diplomatic pouches share the same rats.

name: Fusion research park
description: Glass campuses hiding cores that glow when the grid dips.

name: Harbor manifest office
description: Rubber stamps for containers that never matched their bills.

name: Industrial wharf
description: Cranes that swing wide for crates no inspector booked.

name: Legislator smoking room
description: Where amendments die quietly and wallets grow loud.

name: Marina dead drop
description: Locker combinations whispered over diesel and gulls.

name: Mercenary bar
description: House vodka; contracts laminated so blood wipes clean.

name: News network floor
description: Green rooms where truth gets graded before airtime.

name: Private bank box room
description: Quiet desks; louder ledgers one corridor over.

name: Rooftop satfarm
description: Dishes angled just shy of legal spectrum; drones recharge beside.

name: Shell company suite
description: Brass plaques for firms whose desks have never been sat at.

name: Underground server farm
description: Cold aisles humming under a bakery’s flour dust.
